title: EpicTroll
body:
💬 Need help? Join the Discord: 👉 Discord Support: [https://discord.gg/cT5MxqAYTd](https://discord.gg/cT5MxqAYTd)


🛠️ All messages are fully configurable! 📜 Commands - /troll anvil - /troll explode - /troll fire [duration in seconds] - /troll freeze - /troll knocbackstick – gives you a knockback stick - /troll mob - /troll reload - /troll apple [player] [amount] - /troll diamond (player) - /troll launch (player) - /troll cookie (player) (amount) - gives a infinite cookie! - /troll fakeop [player] - /troll blockcraft [player] - /troll reversechat (player) - /troll fakexp (player) (amount) - /troll blocktooluse (player) - /troll dropinv (player) - **/troll gui [player]**

🔐 Permissions - epictroll.anvil - epictroll.explode - epictroll.fire - epictroll.freeze - epictroll.knockbackstick - epictroll.mob - epictroll.apple - epictroll.diamond - epictroll.launch - epictroll.cookie - epictroll.fakeop - epictroll.blockcraft - epictroll.reversechat - epictroll.dropinv - epictroll.blocktooluse - epictroll.fakexp - epictroll.gui - epictroll.help - epictroll.reload - epictroll.* (for everything)

⭐ If you like my plugin, give ❤️
